title: ChainRecord
description: An immutable on-chain proof record for a published research artifact.

artifactId.description: The artifact this chain record proves.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the artifact bundle at time of publish.

ipfsCid.description: IPFS CID where the full artifact bundle is stored.

chain.description: The blockchain network used for anchoring.

txHash.description: The transaction hash on the blockchain.

blockNumber.description: Block number in which the transaction was confirmed.

publishedBy.description: Who triggered the publish (user or agent ID).

previousVersionTx.description: txHash of the previous version, creating a revision chain.

publishedAt.description: When the on-chain anchoring was confirmed.
